# RaidScout

> RaidScout is a guild operations platform for competitive MMO guilds. Track bosses, manage rotations, run DKP auctions, scan rally screenshots, track gear, and more.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.raidscout.com): Boss timers, DKP auctions, leaderboards, analytics
- [Changelog](https://www.raidscout.com/changelog): Daily changelogs tracking every feature and fix
- [Terms of Service](https://www.raidscout.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.raidscout.com/privacy)
- [Refund Policy](https://www.raidscout.com/refund)

## Key Features

- **Live Countdown Timers**: Real-time HH:MM:SS countdowns for every boss. Fixed Hours and Fixed Schedule spawn modes.
- **Multi-Guild Rotation**: Per-kill, daily, and fixed-schedule rotation with weighted turns.
- **DKP Auction System**: Live bidding with auto-resolve, soft-close, outbid refunds, guild restrictions.
- **AI Rally Scanning**: Upload screenshots and AI detects player names automatically.
- **Discord Bot**: 15+ commands, spawn/kill notifications, WebSocket gateway.
- **Leaderboard & Points**: Configurable points per boss. Weekly/monthly/all-time rankings with finalization.
- **Gear & Equipment**: Per-member gear tracking across all slots with enhancement badges.
- **Inventory & Loot**: Full item catalog with rarity system, distribution tracking, analytics.
- **Member Profiles**: CP trends, loot history, attendance, equipment grid, public profiles.
- **Analytics**: Guild kill trends, CP growth, activity attendance with interactive charts.
